headline: Assessing D.R. Horton (DHI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Cooldown
summary: Stock performance snapshot around D.R. Horton (DHI) D.R. Horton (DHI) has seen mixed share price moves recently, with the stock up 5.2% over the past day and slightly higher over the past week, but down over the past month and past 3 months. For longer term holders, the picture is different, with total returns of 20% over the past year, 37.3% over 3 years, and 58.2% over 5 years. This provides important context to the recent pullback.
